name: Visions in Ice
description: This model gains the following abilities:

granted_abilities.name: Rime-Touched
granted_abilities.text: The area within 2" of this model is hazardous terrain. Friendly models may choose to be unaffected by this terrain.

granted_abilities.name: Chains of Ice
granted_abilities.text: This model lowers its Sp to 0.

granted_abilities.name: Throw Off Shackles
granted_abilities.text: When this model activates, it may discard this upgrade.

extraction_notes: Limitations section shows a single dash '-', indicating no limitations
The description introduces the three abilities that follow
All three abilities are passive/triggered abilities, not actions
